paccheri-pasta-with-shellfish-squid-and-.name: Paccheri Pasta With Shellfish, Squid, And Tomatoes

ingredients.prep: preferably head-on, peeled, deveined, shells and heads reserved

ingredients.item: Paccheri or other large tube pasta

instructions: Grate tomatoes, cut side down, on the largest holes of a box grater into a medium bowl until only the skin is left. Finely chop skin and add to bowl.
Cut squid bodies in half lengthwise, then cut each half crosswise into 1/2" pieces. Place in a small bowl. Cut tentacles in half crosswise; add to bowl.

Heat 3 Tbsp. oil in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium-high. Add reserved shrimp shells and heads (if using). Cook, smashing down on shells and heads, until shells are beginning to brown, 10–12 minutes. Add 1 cup wine and cook until reduced by half and alcohol aroma is gone, about 5 minutes. Add 2 cups water and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to a bare simmer and cook until reduced by one-third, 15–20 minutes. Let stock cool 20 minutes, then strain through a fine-mesh sieve, pressing on solids, into a heatproof measuring glass (you should have about 1 1/2 cups). Set aside.

Wipe out pot. Pour in remaining 3 Tbsp. oil and heat over medium. Add garlic and cook, stirring occasionally, until just golden, about 5 minutes. Add grated tomatoes and cook, stirring occasionally, until tomatoes thicken slightly and begin to stick to bottom of pot, 6–8 minutes. Add cockles, mussels, red pepper flakes, and remaining 1 cup wine. Cover pot and cook, shaking occasionally, until cockles and mussels are open, about 5 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer cockles and mussels to a medium bowl, leaving behind any that have not opened. Cover pot again and cook unopened cockles and mussels another minute or so, then transfer to bowl with others. Discard any that have not opened at this point. Keep shellfish sauce warm.
Meanwhile, cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water, until just slightly under al dente, 6–8 minutes.

Using a heatproof measuring cup, scoop out about 1 cup pasta water. Transfer pasta to pot with sauce with a slotted spoon or mesh spider. Add reserved stock and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to a simmer and add shrimp and squid to sauce. Cook, tossing constantly and adding pasta water a splash at a time as needed, until pasta is al dente and sauce is glossy and thick enough to cling to noodles, about 5 minutes. Add fish sauce, if using, and fold in steamed cockles and mussels. Taste and season with salt if needed.
Transfer pasta to a platter. Top with basil and drizzle with oil.

pan-banging-ginger-molasses-cookies.name: Pan-banging Ginger Molasses Cookies
instructions: Adjust an oven rack to the middle of the oven. Preheat the oven to 177°C. Line three sheet pans with aluminum foil, dull-side up.
In a small bowl, whisk together the flour, ginger, cinnamon, salt, baking soda, and cloves.

In the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with a paddle, beat the butter on medium speed until creamy, about 1 minute. Add 1½ cups (300 g) of the sugar and beat on medium speed until light and fluffy, 2 to 3 minutes. Add the egg, molasses, and vanilla, and mix on low speed to combine. Add the flour mixture and mix on low speed until combined. Remove the bowl from the stand mixer and, using a spatula, make sure the molasses is completely combined into the dough and that the dough is a uniform color.

Form the dough into 3 oz (85 g) balls (¼ cup), and roll them in the remaining ¼ cup (50 g) of sugar. Place 3 or 4 cookies an equal distance apart on the sheet pans. Bake the cookies one pan at a time. Bake until the dough balls have spread flat but are puffed slightly in the center, 8 minutes.

Lift one side of the sheet pan up about 4 inches and gently let it drop down against the oven rack, so the edges of the cookies set and the inside falls back down. After the cookies puff up again in about 2 minutes, repeat lifting and dropping the pan. Repeat 3 or 4 more times to create ridges around the edge of the cookie. Bake for 14 to 15 minutes total, until the cookies have spread out and the edges are golden brown but the centers are much lighter and not fully cooked.

pan-grilled-zucchini.name: Pan-grilled Zucchini
instructions: Toss zucchini strips with olive oil in a bowl until evenly coated. Toss in rosemary, salt, garlic powder, and pepper until coated.
Heat a grill pan over medium-high heat; coat with cooking spray.
Grill zucchini until soft and grill marked, 4 to 5 minutes per side. Work in batches if needed, coating pan with cooking spray between batches.

panamanian-sancocho.name: Panamanian Sancocho
instructions: Combine water, chicken, plantains, onion, cilantro, garlic, and salt in a large pot. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium; cook until chicken is longer pink at the bone and the juices run clear, about 45 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of the thigh, near the bone should read 74°C (74 degrees C).
Remove the chicken and let cool. Add yuca, potatoes, and corn to the soup; cook over medium heat until yuca and potatoes are softened, about 30 minutes.
Discard chicken skin and bones. Place meat back into the soup; stir to combine.

pappardelle-recipe-with-boscaiola-sauce-.name: Pappardelle Recipe With Boscaiola Sauce
pappardelle-recipe-with-boscaiola-sauce-.original_name: Receta de pappardelle con salsa boscaiola
instructions: Pela la cebolla y corta en cuadritos. Trocea el diente de ajo.
Limpia muy bien los hongos y rebana.
Warm up a frying pan and pour olive oil with butter.
Incorporates onion and garlic tooth and pits for a few minutes without letting them burn.
Agrega la panceta troceada y saltea junto a la cebolla y ajo hasta que quede crujiente.
Add sliced mushrooms, Saxony with salt and pepper to suit. Jumps for 5 minutes till they release their juice.
Incorpora la ramita de tomillo y mezcla para que desprenda su aroma.
Vierte el vino blanco, desglasa el fondo y cocina hasta que reduzca el licor.
Add shredded tomatoes and tighten salt and pepper. Cooking for another 5 minutes with medium heat till a good salsa forms.
Once ready, leave her to light while you make the dough.
Cuece la pasta en agua con sal hasta que quede al dente, debes seguir las instrucciones del empaque.
Drain and book a quarter of a cup of cooking water.
Incorporates dough into frying pan with cooking water.
Mezcla ligeramente hasta que todo se integre. Apaga.
Sirve y esparce queso parmesano y los tomates cherry cortados para decorar.

pappardelle-with-carciofi-e-limone-recip.name: Pappardelle With Carciofi E Limone Recipe
pappardelle-with-carciofi-e-limone-recip.original_name: Receta de pappardelle con carciofi e limone

ingredients.item: 1 yellow lemon (its juice and its fringes)
4 cdas de aceite de oliva ( virgen extra)
2 cdas de queso pecorino romano rallado ((opcional) )
Hojas de menta o albahaca fresca  (para decorar)

instructions: Cleans artichokes by withdrawing hard outer leaves, cuts tipples and pels slightly. Seal them into water with lemon juice to prevent them from ruining.
It cuts the hearts of artichoke into thin sheets and preserves them with lemon water.
In a large frying pan, heat olive oil with medium heat. Add finely minced garlic teeth and damper till they are golden.
Incorporates scattering artichoke sheets and pits for a few minutes. Add the white wine and let evaporate the alcohol.
Add salt and pepper and lemon frying. A low-fire kitchen for 10 minutes till the artichokes are tender.
Meanwhile, cook the pappardelle with abundant salt water till they are at the dente. Reserve half a cup of cooking water.
Add the purée directly to the frying pan with the artichokes. Incorporates butter and some cooking water reserved to emulsify the salsa.
Add the pits (if you use them) and half lemon juice. Gently mix.
Adjust the season with more salt, pepper or lemon if necessary.
Sirve caliente, espolvorea con pecorino y decora con hojas de menta fresca o albahaca.

paradise-date-balls-recipe-lezzet.name: Paradise Date Balls Recipe
instructions: 1. Cut the heaven fame to two and cut the bark crack push.
2. Then make the hurma into a smooth unstable with the help of acatal.
3. Pure add to the hurmaya, honey, oatme flour and oatmeal, and mix well.
4. small parts and add to the mixture, get a centrifuge.
5. Kü from the mixture;punched parts and palms of the creation balls by rolling in.
6. Grab balls by smearing coconut powder.
7. Listen and serve at least 1 hour in the refrigerator you prepared.

passover-charoset.name: Passover Charoset
instructions: Mix apples, grape juice, walnuts, cinnamon, and honey together in a bowl until thoroughly combined.

pasta-allamatriciana.name: Pasta All'amatriciana
instructions: Heat 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a Dutch oven or large heavy skillet over medium heat. Add 4 oz. thinly sliced guanciale, pancetta, or chopped unsmoked bacon and sauté until crisp and golden, about 4 minutes. Add ½ tsp. crushed red pepper flakes and ½ tsp. freshly ground black pepper; cook, stirring, for 10 seconds. Add ¾ cup finely chopped onion and 2 cloves garlic, finely chopped; cook, stirring often, until soft, about 8 minutes. Add one 28-oz. can peeled tomatoes with juices, crushed by hand, reduce to low heat, and cook, stirring occasionally, until amatriciana sauce thickens, 15-20 minutes.

Meanwhile, bring a large pot of water to a boil. Season with kosher salt; add 12 oz. dried bucatini or spaghetti and cook, stirring occasionally, until 2 minutes before al dente. Drain, reserving 1 cup pasta cooking water.

Add drained pasta to sauce in skillet and toss vigorously with tongs to coat. Add ½ cup reserved pasta water and cook until sauce coats pasta and pasta is al dente, about 2 minutes. (Add a little pasta water if sauce is too dry.) Stir in ¼ cup finely grated Pecorino Romano (about 1 oz.).
Editor’s note: This amatriciana recipe was first printed in our May 2011 issue. Head this way for more of our best Italian recipes →

pasta-fazool-pasta-e-fagioli.name: Pasta Fazool (pasta E Fagioli)

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Heat oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Cook and stir sausage in the hot skillet until browned and crumbly, about 5 minutes. Reduce heat to medium. Add diced celery and chopped onion. Cook until onions are translucent, 4 to 5 minutes. Add dry pasta; cook and stir for 2 minutes.

Stir in tomato paste until evenly distributed, 2 to 3 minutes. Pour in 3 cups broth; increase heat to high and bring to a boil. Stir in red pepper flakes, oregano, salt, and pepper. Reduce heat to medium and let simmer, stirring often, for about 5 minutes. Add more broth if needed.

Place chopped chard in a bowl. Cover with cold water and rinse leaves; any grit will fall to the bottom of the bowl. Transfer chard to a colander to drain briefly; add to soup. Cook and stir until leaves wilt, 2 to 3 minutes.
Stir in white beans; continue cooking and stirring until pasta is tender, 4 to 5 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in grated cheese. Serve topped with additional grated cheese.
Enjoy!

pasta-salad-a-la-honeybear.name: Pasta Salad A La Honeybear
instructions: Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil; cook rotini at a boil until tender yet firm to the bite, 8 to 10 minutes. Drain and run under cold water to cool.

Mix rotini, red onion, roasted red peppers, mozzarella cheese, artichoke hearts, salami, green olives, black olives, pepperoncini peppers, Italian seasoning, garlic powder, seasoned salt, and black pepper in a large bowl.
Whisk Italian-style dressing and mayonnaise together in a small bowl; pour over rotini mixture and toss to coat. Add Parmesan cheese and mix well. Refrigerate salad at least 2 hours before serving.

pasta-with-creamy-mushroom-ragu.name: Pasta With Creamy Mushroom Ragù

ingredients.prep: shiitake, oyster, and/or maitake), tough stems trimmed, coarsely chopped
finely grated (about  0.5 cup), plus more for serving

instructions: Heat oil in a small pot or large saucepan over medium. Add onion and a big pinch of salt. Cook, stirring occasionally, until onion is very soft, 6–8 minutes. Add garlic and cook, stirring often, until softened and beginning to turn golden around edges, about 4 minutes.
Add tomato paste to pot and cook, stirring constantly, until slightly darkened in color, about 1 minute. Add mushrooms and season with more salt. Cook, stirring often, until softened, 6–8 minutes.

Add cream and 1 cup water, increase heat to high, and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer, stirring occasionally, until ragù is slightly thickened, 13–17 minutes. Taste and season with pepper and more salt as needed.
Cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until very al dente, about 2 minutes less than package directions. Drain, reserving 2 cups pasta cooking liquid.

Add pasta, butter, 1 cup pasta cooking liquid, and 1 oz. Parmesan to ragù. Cook, tossing and adding more pasta cooking liquid by ¼-cupful as needed, until sauce coats pasta and pasta is al dente, about 2 minutes.
Divide pasta among shallow bowls or plates and top with more Parmesan.

pasta-with-shellfish-squid-and-tomatoes.name: Pasta With Shellfish, Squid, And Tomatoes

ingredients.prep: preferably head-on, peeled, deveined, shells and heads reserved

ingredients.item: . paccheri or other large tube pasta

instructions: Grate tomatoes, cut side down, on the largest holes of a box grater into a medium bowl until only the skin is left. Finely chop skin and add to bowl.
Cut squid bodies in half lengthwise, then cut each half crosswise into ½" pieces. Place in a small bowl. Cut tentacles in half crosswise; add to bowl.

Heat 3 Tbsp. oil in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium-high. Add reserved shrimp shells and heads (if using). Cover pot again and cook unopened cockles and mussels another minute or so, then transfer to bowl with others. Discard any that have not opened at this point. Keep shellfish sauce warm.
Meanwhile, cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water, until just slightly under al dente, 6–8 minutes.

Using a heatproof measuring cup, scoop out about 1 cup pasta water. Transfer pasta to pot with sauce with a slotted spoon or mesh spider. Add reserved stock and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to a simmer and add shrimp and squid to sauce. Cook, tossing constantly and adding pasta water a splash at a time as needed, until pasta is al dente and sauce is glossy and thick enough to cling to noodles, about 5 minutes. Add fish sauce, if using, and fold in steamed cockles and mussels. Taste and season with salt if needed.
Transfer pasta to a platter. Top with basil and drizzle with oil.

pastry-shop-argiro.name: Pastry Shop
instructions: We choose ripe and strong figs. We wash them well and press them lightly to shut them up.
Place the oven grill on a sheet, drizzle the figs and cover them with tullpan or tulle. Let them dry well for about two weeks, depending on the intensity of the sun.
We shoot them every two days so they dry evenly from all sides. Then we open them in half, without completely separating them.
In a large bowl, mix the sesame, cinnamon and nuts with a spoon (optional).
We roll in the fig and then stick it on another opened fig.
After filling them with two figs in one, add them to a sheet and make them in a preheated oven at 150°3′ for about 20′, until they brown slightly and small the house.
After leaving them on the grill to cool completely, line them up to a glass vessel that closes airtightly.
Per layer, add a leaf (this preserves them).
They've been kept for months closed airtight.

pastry-with-sauce-lezzet.name: Pastry With Sauce
instructions: 1. Peel potatoes and crush it with fork.
2. Carrot clean and reinde.
3. Mix potatoes, peas and caviar in a bowl.
4. Mix thyme, salt and pepper again.
5.   slice the most.
6. Add and mix Kasarpeynirine.
7. Sosisleri dilimleyin.
8. Clean and wash the sweater and sprinkle the salt and rub it light.
9. Mix sausage and spinach in a bowl.
10. Oil the tray.
11. 11. 11. 11. Place a Yufkayi on the tray as whole.
12. Potato Blend Yufkanin u broadcast on the car.
12. August Second Yufkayi small partial to tray.
14 July U broadcast fungal on the car.
15. The third place of the material and add the material with spinach.
16. Place the sack with the mixture of wetlands u place it on the floor and collect the stones from the edges of the leg.
17. September September Aça cup of yogurt with liquid oil and leaflet.
18. Susam and ser serpin.
19. September September 30 minutes in the oven with a heated amount of 200 degrees.
20. Mix the garlic with the remaining yogurt.
21. Peel the shells of tomato and peel the tiny brush and pan for 5 minutes.
22. Pour yogurt from the tip of the spoon.
23. Take a spoon tomato sauce and serve.

peach-walnut-cake-lezzet.name: Peach Walnut Cake
instructions: 1. Put eggs at room temperature and sugar into a deep container.
2. Spray up to 2-3 minutes foam with the help of the mixer.
3. Add vanilla with melted butter on it.
4. In addition to flour and baking powder and continue to cook until it is thoroughly identical.
5. Oil the cake mold with softened butter.
6. Firstly sprinkle 3 teaspoon flour into 3 teaspoons of powder sugar cake mold.
7. Reverse the cake mold and pour excess flour and sugar.
8. Then peel the shells and eliminate 2 divided peaches, index the surroundings of the chopstick mold in the form of apple slice.
9. Slowly broadcast on the serpin and cake mortar for walnuts, which are also taken in the middle.
10. Pre-heated 180 degree bake up to brown on the oven.
11. 11. After cooling, reverse to a service plate.
12. Overni powder decorate and serve with Antep nuts.

peanut-butter-and-chocolate-cake-lezzet.name: Peanut Butter And Chocolate Cake
instructions: 1. melt the butter.
2. Bitter add and get from the space.
3. Mix up to melt in the kitchen.
4. Add sugar and salt of powder &lye;remove.
5. Add the eggs to the one and continue to go to &ccedil.
6. Add and mix peanut.
7. Finally, add flour, cocoa and vanilla and transfer it to the baking mold you lubricate after mixing.
8. Bake 45 minutes in oven with a heated amount of 160 degrees.
9. slice and serve the cold.

peanut-butter-cream-cold-brew.name: Peanut Butter Cream Cold Brew
instructions: Combine heavy whipping cream, syrup, peanut butter, and powdered peanut butter in a bowl. Whip with a hand mixer until creamy and slightly thickened.
Fill 2 glasses with ice. Add 1 tablespoon vanilla syrup to each glass, fill 2/3 of the way with cold brew coffee, and divide peanut butter cream evenly between both.

peanut-butter-cup-cookies.name: Peanut Butter Cup Cookies
instructions: In a bowl, add the butter and brown sugar, and stir to combine.
Add the egg and mix until fully incorporated.
Stir in the peanut butter and vanilla.
Add the flour, salt, and baking soda.
Gently fold in the peanut butter cups.
Chill dough for at least 1 hour.
Preheat oven to 350˚F (180˚C).
Once dough is chilled, scoop out a ball about 2 inches (5 cm) wide. Place on a parchment paper-lined baking sheet, leaving about 2-inches (5 cm) in between each ball of dough.
Bake for 8 to 10 minutes, until bottom edges of cookies are golden.
Let cookies cool. Can be stored in an airtight container up to 5 days.
Enjoy!

peanut-butter-monster-cookie-dream-bars.name: Peanut Butter Monster Cookie Dream Bars
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Stir oats, flour, butter, brown sugar, baking soda, and salt together in a bowl. Reserve 1 1/2 cups of crumb mixture. Spread remaining mixture into a 9x13-inch baking pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until crust is lightly browned, about 12 minutes. Remove crust; leave oven on.
Mix sweetened condensed milk and peanut butter together in a bowl. Spread over the baked crust. Sprinkle the reserved crumb mixture and milk chocolate pieces on top.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, about 20 minutes.

pecan-pumpkin-pie.name: Pecan Pumpkin Pie

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or 1 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Whisk rye flour, sugar, salt, and 1½ cups all-purpose flour in a large bowl to combine. Add butter and toss to evenly coat. Working quickly and aggressively, use your fingers to rub butter into flour to create large shaggy pieces of dough (you want some pieces of butter that are flat and thin and some that are large and chunky). Drizzle 5 Tbsp. ice water over, running your fingers through flour mixture to evenly distribute. Knead dough in bowl until it starts to come together (it should look a little dry, but add more ice water by the teaspoonful if needed, just until dough comes together).

Turn dough out onto a work surface and knead 1 or 2 more times, pressing to incorporate shaggy edges and any loose bits. Dust surface and dough lightly with flour to keep dough from sticking. Using your hands, form dough into about a 7x5" rectangle. Using your rolling pin, gently tap and press dough to compact and tidy up edges. Roll out dough, dusting dough and surface as needed, until 3 times longer than when you started. Fold dough over onto itself in thirds like a letter to make a square. Wrap in plastic and chill until firm, at least 30 minutes.

Preheat oven to 400°. Roll out dough on a lightly floured surface to about a 12" round. Wrap dough around your rolling pin and unfurl into a standard 9"-diameter pie dish. Gently lift dough so it slumps down into edges of dish. Trim overhang and crimp as desired. Line crust with parchment paper or foil. Place dish on a rimmed baking sheet and fill with pie weights or dried beans. Bake until edges of crust start to brown, about 20 minutes. Remove parchment and weights. Decrease oven temperature to 350° and bake crust until edges are golden, 20–25 minutes. Remove dish from oven and brush 1 Tbsp. egg white over bottom of crust. Return to oven and bake until crust is golden brown, 5–10 minutes (the egg creates a water-resistant coating that helps prevent the custard from making the bottom soggy). Reserve remaining egg white for topping.
Do Ahead: Dough can be made 3 days ahead; keep chilled. Crust can be baked 3 days ahead; store tightly wrapped at room temperature.

While your crust is baking, combine eggs, egg yolk, pie filling, cream, granulated sugar, whiskey, cinnamon, ginger, nutmeg, cardamom, cloves, 6 Tbsp. brown sugar, 2 Tbsp. butter, and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a large bowl and blend with an immersion blender until smooth; try not to aerate. (Alternatively, you can whisk mixture well and blend in 2 batches in a blender until smooth and homogenous.)
Pour into crust and bake pie (still at 350°) until filling is puffed and mostly set with just a slight wobble in the center when gently shaken, 40–45 minutes.
Just before the pie is done baking, toast pecans on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing once, until slightly darkened and fragrant, 8–10 minutes.

Whisk reserved egg white, remaining 2 Tbsp. brown sugar, and remaining ¾ tsp. salt in a small bowl until foamy, about 30 seconds. Add syrup and remaining 1 Tbsp. butter; whisk just to combine. Add pecans and toss to coat.

Carefully remove pie from oven and top with pecan mixture, allowing any excess egg white mixture to drip back into the bowl. Return pie to oven and bake until filling is completely set (a tester or paring knife inserted into the center should come out clean) and nuts are not tacky to the touch, 8–10 minutes. Transfer pie to a wire rack and let cool, at least 2 hours. Serve with whipped cream if desired.
Do Ahead: Pie can be baked 1 day ahead. Store uncovered in a cool oven or at room temperature.

phat-sii-krong-neua.name: Phat Sii Krong Neua

ingredients.item: . finely chopped cilantro root or stem

instructions: Smash garlic and cilantro root with a mortar and pestle to a smooth paste. Scrape paste into a small bowl and whisk in oyster sauce, fish sauce, and white pepper.

Cut short ribs between the bones to create flat pieces that are about 2" wide. Season lightly all over with salt, place in bowl with marinade, and toss to coat. Cover bowl with a large plate or plastic wrap and chill ribs at least 2 hours and up to 12 hours.
Let ribs sit at room temperature 30 minutes before cooking.
Whisk oyster sauce, fish sauce, white pepper, and 2 Tbsp. water in a small bowl to combine. Set sauce aside.

Heat oil in a large heavy pot over medium-high. Working in batches to avoid crowding, cook ribs in a single layer until browned, about 2 minutes per side. Using tongs, transfer to a plate. Pour off all but 2 Tbsp. oil from pot.

Place pot back over medium-high heat. Cook onion, garlic, and chiles, stirring occasionally and scraping up any browned bits and adding a splash of water if pan looks dry, until onion is slightly softened, about 5 minutes. Return meat to pot and pour reserved sauce over. Cook, stirring often, until flavors come together, about 2 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in scallions and basil.
Transfer stir-fry to a platter or bowl and serve with rice.

piano-in-the-oven-teleculinaria.name: Piano In The Oven

ingredients.item: 1 colher (sopa) bem cheia de salsa picada
Migas de broa e couve para acompanhar

instructions: Wash the chilies, remove their feet and pinch them. Peel and pinch your garlic teeth. Season the meat with salt, garlic and chopped chilies, the colorau, parsley and oil.

Make some moves on the meat, put it on a tray and water it with the olive oil. Take it in the oven, preheated at 185°C, until it is coloured, and in the middle of the cooking it should water it with balsamic vinegar and turn it upside down.
Retire a carne do forno e sirva-a fatiada, acompanhada com migas de broa e couve e decorada com rodelas de chilli.

pickled-pepper-and-boquerones-toast.name: Pickled Pepper And Boquerónes Toast
instructions: Stir together chopped fresh parsley, finely chopped garlic, and lemon zest with olive oil to moisten. Set aside.
Season jarred piquillo peppers with Sherry or red wine vinegar, salt, and pepper.
Drizzle toasted country-style bread with olive oil. Top each slice with the seasoned peppers, boquerónes, and a spoonful of the parsley mixture. Serve immediately.

pickled-vegetable-salad-with-nori-vinaig.name: Pickled Vegetable Salad With Nori Vinaigrette
instructions: Place radishes, carrots, onion, and cucumber in 4 separate bowls or jars. Bring sugar, salt, 1 cup vinegar, and 2 cups water to a boil in a medium saucepan, stirring to dissolve sugar. Pour pickling liquid over vegetables to cover; let cool. Cover and chill.

Grind nori in a blender, scraping down sides as needed, until finely ground. Add oil, soy sauce, mirin, and remaining ¼ cup vinegar and blend until smooth. Toss lettuces and dressing in a large bowl to coat. Drain pickled vegetables and arrange on top of salad.
DO AHEAD: Nori vinaigrette can be made 3 days ahead; cover and chill. Vegetables can be pickled 1 day ahead; keep chilled.

pies-with-yogurt-and-flour-argiro.name: Pies With Yogurt And Flour

ingredients.item: A little dill finely chopped or other herbs for dough and serving
A little dill finely chopped or other herbs for dough and serving

instructions: Lightly heat the yogurt — an important step, since the dough does not contain yeast.
Place the yogurt in a bowl and touch it for a few minutes on a boiling pot (ben marie).
Once heated, in about 2 minutes, remove from heat and add salt, baking powder, lemon juice and finely chopped herbs of our choice (dill or fennel, but also basil, mint) stirring with a spoon.
Add half the flour to the yoghurt mixture and mix with the spoon until well wet.
Add the rest of the flour and continue mixing until we have a soft, supple dough. Transfer to a slightly floured bowl, cover and set it to a warm place for at least 15-20 minutes. .
Gently flour our hands and work bench, pour the dough on top and work gently with the fingertips.
We open it on a tray about 20 cm in diameter and cut into six equally sized pieces. Create each piece into a small round pie about 1/2 cm thick.
Heat a non-stick pan well over medium heat, without oil.
Shake the excess flour from the pitula and place it in the hot pan.
Bake for 1 minute on each side, until slightly puffed and golden.
Remove the pies from the pan and touch them warm on a wooden surface. Add some olive oil and sprinkle them with fresh herbs.
They are ideal for every hour of the day and accompany all dips ( pepper salads, tyrosalata etc.)

pineapple-and-rum-sorbet-recipe-comedera.name: Pineapple And Rum Sorbet Recipe
pineapple-and-rum-sorbet-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de sorbete piña y ron
instructions: Cut pineapple into cubes and drink with a scuba of water till you get a purée. Reserve.
Mix sugar with water and heat. Cooking at medium heat - low for 5 minutes or until a light syrup forms.
Mix pineapple purée with syrup, lemon juice and pint of salt.
Vierte el ron blanco y mezcla muy bien.
The mixture can be filled if you wish to have a more thin texture and leave it with them.
Refrigera la mezcla durante 1 hora en la parte baja de la nevera para que temple.
After that time, pass the mixture to a metal container and freeze for 4 hours. Each 30 minutes remove to achieve the perfect texture and break the crystals.
Once ready, serve in pg cups cold to maintain consistency.
Enjoy!

pineapple-cinnamon-ham-glaze.name: Pineapple Cinnamon Ham Glaze
instructions: Mix brown sugar, flour, and cinnamon together in a bowl. Stir vinegar, water, honey, and mustard together in a saucepan; add brown sugar mixture and whisk until blended. Turn heat to medium-high, stir crushed pineapple into mixture, and bring to a boil, whisking constantly, until thickened, 2 to 3 minutes.

pineapple-margarita.name: Pineapple Margarita

ingredients.item: Fluid ounce freshly squeezed lime juice

instructions: Fill a cocktail shaker half-full with ice. Add pineapple juice, tequila, triple sec, and lime juice to the shaker. Seal and shake vigorously until outside is frosted, 10 to 15 seconds.
Sprinkle salt onto a plate. Moisten the rim of a glass with a lime wedge. Press the moistened rim into the salt. Fill glass with ice.
Strain margarita into the glass and garnish with pineapple and lime wedge, if desired.

piri-piri-chicken.name: Piri-piri Chicken

ingredients.item: Piri-piri sauce or other hot pepper sauce
Piri-piri sauce or other hot pepper sauce
Extra-virgin olive oil plus additional for brushing

instructions: Melt butter in small saucepan over medium-high heat. Add cilantro and garlic; cook until garlic begins to brown, about 2 minutes. Add piri-piri sauce and lemon juice. Reduce heat to medium-low; simmer 2 minutes. DO AHEAD Glaze can be made up to 1 day ahead. Cover and chill. Rewarm before using.
Finely chop cilantro, ginger, shallot, and garlic in processor. Add piri-piri sauce, 1/4 cup oil, lemon juice, coarse salt, and pepper; process marinade to blend.

Place chicken, skin side up, on work surface. Using palm of hand, press on breastbone to flatten chicken. Tuck wing tips under. Pour half of marinade into 11x7x2-inch glass baking dish. Open chicken like book; place skin side down in single layer in dish. Pour remaining marinade over. Cover; chill at least 4 hours or overnight, turning chicken occasionally.

Remove top rack from barbecue. Prepare barbecue (medium heat). If using 2-burner gas grill, light 1 burner. If using 3-burner gas grill, do not light center burner. If using charcoal grill, light briquettes in chimney and pour onto 1 side of lower grill rack. Place disposable aluminum pan on unlit part of grill. Place upper grill rack on barbecue; brush with oil.

Remove chicken from marinade. Arrange skin side up on grill rack above drip pan. Cover barbecue; grill until skin is browned and instant-read thermometer inserted into thickest part of thigh registers 74°C, turning often, about 40 minutes. Transfer to platter. Pour warm glaze over.

pistachio-brittle.name: Pistachio Brittle
instructions: Line a rimmed baking sheet with parchment paper and lightly coat with cooking spray.

Combine 3/4 cup plus 2 tablespoons sugar, butter, water, and salt in a saucepan over medium heat. Cook and stir until butter has melted, 3 to 5 minutes. Add syrup and stir until the sugar is completely dissolved and melted, about 5 minutes.
Allow mixture to come to a boil, stirring constantly. Once mixture reaches 154°C (155 degrees C), remove saucepan from heat. Stir in pistachios, baking soda, and cayenne (mixture will foam).

Stir until mixture is no longer bubbling and caramel is smooth, about 1 minute. Transfer to the prepared baking sheet and spread out with a lightly greased spatula. Let cool until firm, about 15 minutes. Break into pieces.

pizza-bombs-lezzet.name: Pizza Bombs
instructions: 1. Take the bread dough into small bees.
2. Open by opening it with your hands.
3. Spread tomato porridge until a meal is eyebrow.
4. Add the sucuk and bake cheese you've filled with the cube.
5. Take the dough into a baking tray with roll and oily paper series.
6. Take olive oil in a bowl.
7. Add and mix salt and spices.
8. Remove the spicy olive oil on pizza bombs with the help of a brush.
9. Bake until the rubbish in the oven of 180 degrees, which is previously heated.
10. Serve hot.

polish-pickles.name: Polish Pickles
instructions: Dry excess moisture off of pickles.
Spread cream cheese, about 1/4 inch thick, on two slices of lunch meat.
Wrap meat around a pickle.
Repeat with remaining ingredients.
Chill and slice into rounds.

pollo-asado.name: Pollo Asado

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 1 0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Spatchcock 1 3½–4 lb. whole chicken by cutting along both sides of the backbone with kitchen shears or a sharp knife. Remove backbone (save for stock!) and turn chicken over on cutting board so it is resting breast side up. Press down on center of breast until you hear a crack (this will help the chicken lie flatter on the grill). Pat dry.

Purée 1 bunch culantro or cilantro, tough stems trimmed, 1 small onion, coarsely chopped, 2 garlic cloves, 2 chile congos or 1 habanero chile, stems removed, 1 cup naranja agria (sour orange juice), or ½ cup fresh orange juice plus ½ cup fresh lime juice, 2 Tbsp. plus 1½ tsp. achiote (annatto) paste, and 1 Tbsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¾ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a blender until smooth. Place chicken in a resealable bag or large bowl and pour marinade over; turn to coat. Seal bag (or cover bowl) and chill at least 4 hours and up to 1 day.

Prepare a grill for indirect medium-high heat (for a charcoal grill, bank coals on one side of grill); rub vegetable oil on grate. Remove chicken from marinade, letting any excess marinade drip back into bag or container. Season chicken lightly with salt. Grill chicken, skin side up, over direct heat until lightly charred, about 5 minutes. Turn over and grill until skin is lightly charred, about 5 minutes. Turn skin side up and move to cooler part of grill. Cover and grill until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of thighs registers 165°, about 1 hour. (If the chicken has reached temperature but needs a bit more color, return to hotter part of grill and grill over direct heat until darker, checking every minute or so.) Transfer chicken to a cutting board and let rest 10 minutes before carving. Serve with lime wedges for squeezing over.


Editor’s note: This recipe was first published in July 2021. Head this way for more of our best grilled chicken recipes →

pollo-guisado-dominican-stewed-chicken.name: Pollo Guisado (dominican Stewed Chicken)

ingredients.prep: skin removed and cut into pieces

instructions: Place chicken pieces in a bowl and season generously with ranchero sazon criollo. Add onion, Cubanelle peppers, sazon liquido, and garlic paste. Toss to coat chicken evenly.

Put oil in the bottom of a heavy pot. Add brown sugar and do not stir. Turn heat to medium-high and cook until sugar is very, very dark brown but not burned, 5 to 10 minutes. Carefully add chicken pieces to the pot 1 at a time, reserving vegetables and any liquid left in the bowl. Stir chicken, coating each piece with sugar-oil mixture. Cover and cook for 8 to 10 minutes.

Add reserved vegetables and liquid, water, tomato paste, celery, and bouillon powder to the pot and stir to combine. Cover and reduce heat to medium-low. Let stew until chicken is cooked and tender, 15 to 30 minutes.

pork-chops-with-glazed-turnips-and-cider.name: Pork Chops With Glazed Turnips And Cider Sauce
instructions: Combine all ingredients except pork in large saucepan; boil, stirring to dissolve salt. Chill brine, then add pork. Cover and refrigerate overnight.

Cook sugar in heavy small saucepan over medium heat until melted and deep golden brown, stirring occasionally, about 5 minutes. Add vinegar (mixture will bubble) and stir until hardened syrup dissolves, about 3 minutes. Add both broths and sage; boil until reduced to 1/3 cup, 8 to 10 minutes. DO AHEAD Sauce can be made 1 day ahead. Cover; chill.
Cook turnips in medium saucepan of boiling salted water until tender, about 8 minutes. Drain, cool, and peel. Cut turnips in half through stem end.

Heat 1 tablespoon oil in small skillet over medium heat. Add turnips, cut side down; cook without turning until golden brown on bottom, about 8 minutes. Pour off oil. DO AHEAD Can be made 2 hours ahead. Let stand at room temperature.

Preheat oven to 177°C. Drain pork. Pat dry with paper towels. Sprinkle pork with pepper. Heat 2 tablespoons oil in heavy large ovenproof skillet over medium-high heat. Add pork; cook until brown, about 3 minutes per side. Add 1 tablespoon butter and sage to skillet; baste pork with butter. Transfer skillet to oven. Roast until thermometer inserted into center of chops registers 60°C, 10 to 15 minutes. Remove pork from oven; let rest 10 minutes.
Meanwhile, add maple syrup and 1/2 tablespoon butter to turnips and cook over medium-high heat until turnips are thickly coated, stirring frequently, about 5 minutes. Rewarm sauce.
Transfer pork and turnips to plates. Drizzle sauce over pork and serve.

pork-chops-with-raspberrychili-chimichur.name: Pork Chops With Raspberry–chili Chimichurri

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or 1 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Prepare a grill for medium-high heat; oil grate with vegetable oil. Season two 1½"-thick bone-in pork rib chops (about 1½ lb.) all over with kosher salt, then drizzle extra-virgin olive oil on both sides and rub into meat to evenly coat. Let sit while you make the raspberry chimichurri.

Mash 2 cups fresh raspberries (about 1 pint) in a small bowl with a fork until there are no large pieces left. Add ½ medium shallot, finely chopped, 2 Tbsp. crushed Calabrian chiles, 1 Tbsp. fresh lime juice, 1½ tsp. sugar, ¼ cup extra-virgin olive oil, and 1½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 tsp. Morton kosher salt and mix well; set raspberry chimichurri aside.

Grill pork chops, turning occasionally, until deeply browned and an instant-read thermometer inserted near the bone registers 140° (internal temperature should climb to 145° as the chops rest), 9–12 minutes. Transfer to a cutting board and let rest 5 minutes.
To serve, carve meat away from pork chop bones and slice against the grain; arrange on a platter. Spoon reserved raspberry chimichurri over.

pork-pozole-rojo.name: Pork Pozole Rojo
instructions: Cut the onion in half. Dice one half and cut the other half into quarters.

In a medium pot, combine the quartered onion, whole garlic cloves, a pinch of salt, and the ancho, arbol, japones and guajillo chiles with enough water to cover and bring to a boil over medium heat. Cook until the chiles are tender, about 30 minutes.

Transfer the chiles, onion, and garlic from the pot to a blender. Add 1 cup of the chile cooking liquid and blend until smooth, 2-3 minutes. Strain the puréed chiles through a fine-mesh sieve into a medium bowl to remove any solids.

In a large pot, combine 12-18 cups of water, the pork, diced onion, salt, bay leaf, and minced garlic. Bring to a simmer over medium-low heat and cook until the meat is cooked through, about 30 minutes.
Pour the puréed chiles into the pot with the pork. Stir in the hominy, then cover and simmer for about 45 minutes, or until the pork is tender. Season with salt to taste.
Ladle the hot pozole into bowls and top with shredded cabbage and Mexican oregano. Serve with lime wedges alongside.
Enjoy!

pork-sausage-with-coconut-chile-sauce-an.name: Pork Sausage With Coconut-chile Sauce And Lychees

ingredients.item: Champagne vinegar or white wine vinegar
Shichimi togarashi can be found at japanese markets and in the asian foods section of some supermarkets.

instructions: Bring chile and coconut milk to a simmer in a large saucepan over medium heat and cook, stirring occasionally, until reduced by half, 10–15 minutes. Remove from heat; discard chile. Add vinegar and sugar, stirring until sugar dissolves; season with salt. Let cool.

Cook garlic and oil in a medium skillet over medium heat, stirring often, until garlic is golden brown, about 5 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer garlic to paper towels to drain; season with salt.

Increase heat to medium-high. Add pork and red pepper flakes to skillet; season with salt and pepper. Cook, breaking up pork and pressing firmly to help brown, until cooked through and crisped in spots, 6–8 minutes.
Spoon sauce into bowls and top with garlic, basil, cilantro, mint, peanuts, and shichimi togarashi. Spoon pork along with some pan drippings over; drizzle with lime juice. Top with lychees and onion.

potted-pork.name: Potted Pork

ingredients.item: . sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar

instructions: Preheat oven to 275°. Mix sugar, pepper, dried thyme, cinnamon, cloves, nutmeg, and 1 Tbsp. salt in a small bowl. Place pork in a roasting pan and season with spice mixture. Cover with foil and cook until fork-tender, 3–4 hours. Let pork cool in pan.

Meanwhile, heat butter in a small saucepan over medium heat until foaming, about 5 minutes. Skim foam from surface; discard. Gently simmer butter, skimming foam from surface, until butter is clear (do not let solids brown). Slowly pour clarified butter into a small bowl, leaving solids behind (you should have about 1 cup). Cover; chill until firm, 1–2 hours.

Coarsely shred pork and place in the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the paddle attachment. Add fresh thyme and ¾ cup clarified butter and mix on medium-low speed until a coarse but emulsified mixture forms; season with salt. Divide mixture between two 8-oz. jars, packing down. Melt remaining clarified butter in a small saucepan over low heat; pour over mixture. Cover jars. Chill until pork mixture is firm, at least 4 hours.
DO AHEAD: Clarified butter and potted pork can be made 1 week ahead. Keep chilled. Let potted pork sit at room temperature 2 hours before serving.

Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add shallots and cook, stirring occasionally, until browned, 8–10 minutes; remove from heat. Add brandy, then return pan to heat and cook shallot mixture until brandy is reduced by half, about 2 minutes. Add garlic, thyme, and broth; cook, stirring occasionally, until shallots are soft and glazed, 25–35 minutes. Remove from heat, discard garlic and thyme, and stir in vinegar and sugar; season with salt. Let cool.
Serve potted pork with braised shallots, toasts, and mustard.
DO AHEAD: Shallots can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill.

powdered-sugar-heart-cookies-lezzet.name: Powdered Sugar Heart Cookies
instructions: 1. *Susam, softened butter in room heat, eggs and powdered sugar in the lower adjustment of the mixer.
2. *Add your desired flour with baking powder.
3. Listen to 2 hours in the refrigerator of yoğurup until it comes to the harmony that does not stick.
4. *Cut the dough with 2 mm thick and heart-shaped molds on the unified countertop.
5. Index of the oven tray intermittently.
6. Open holes to pipetle corners.
7. Lightly water with brush on the joints.
8. Bake in the oven with pre-heated to 160 degrees.
9. *Take the cookies you extract from the oven wire.
10. After cooling, decorate with the ribbon and sprinkle the powder.
11. 11. Serve.

prawn-curry-teleculinaria.name: Prawn Curry
instructions: Cook the gambas in salted water for 2 minutes. Take them out of the broth, reserve it in the pot. Remove the shell and heads from the gambas, put the first ones in the broth and reserve the kernel.
Take the pot back to the fire and let it boil for 20 minutes. Then crush everything with the magic wand and pass the broth through a thin-netted strainer. Reserve.

Peel and pinch the onion, as well as the chili. Light a pot with olive oil, add the onion and let it saute until golden. Add the chili and tomato and let it cook, in mild heat, for 10 minutes, stirring from time to time.

In the end, crush with the magic wand and season with salt and curry. Add coconut milk and about 200 ml of gamba broth, stir and let it boil. Add the ball of gambas, cover and let cook for another 5 minutes.

However, take to the fire a pot with the water seasoned with salt and the bark of half the lime. Let it boil, add the rice and let it cook for 10 to 14 minutes. Spill the rice, lie in a bowl, season with pepper and scrape the remaining lime and wrap. Serve the curry decorated with coriander leaves and accompanied with rice.

prepare-a-creamy-lemon-pappardelle-comed.name: Prepare A Creamy Lemon Pappardelle
prepare-a-creamy-lemon-pappardelle-comed.original_name: Prepara un cremoso pappardelle al limón

ingredients.item: 200 gr de pappardelle (fresca o seca de buena calidad)
2 cdas de queso parmesano rallado fino
1  yema de huevo ( (opcional, para dar cuerpo a la salsa))
Hojas de albahaca fresca  ((opcional, para decorar))
1 cda de aceite de oliva (virgen extra)
1  pizca de nuez moscada  ((opcional, para profundidad de sabor))

instructions: Fill a big pot with water and get it to a boil. Add salt as seawater.
Cooking papardelle as instructed by the package. If it's fresh pasta, 3 minutes and 3 minutes and 8 to 10 minutes. Reserve 1 cup of cooking water before running.
While cooking the dough, in a large frying pan with medium heat, melt the butter with olive oil.
Add the lemon frilling and paddle for 1 minute to free your essential oils.
Add the pounding cream and mix well. Kitchen with medium-low heat for 2 minutes.
It incorporates the lemon juice and scrambles. The salsa will have an acid taste and will then be balanced with cheese and butter.
Turn off the fire and add parmesan cheese. Revolves till completely ground.
If you want a more unctuous texture, add an egg yolk out of the fire, beating quickly so that it doesn't clot.
It incorporates baked pasta directly into frying pan and mixes with salsa. Add some cooking water to lighten if necessary.
Adjust salt and pepper and add a pint of nutmeg if you wish.
It serves hot, with fresh basil, more lemon and a little more parmesan above.

prepare-a-delicious-shepherds-meat-wire-.name: Prepare A Delicious Shepherd's Meat Wire
prepare-a-delicious-shepherds-meat-wire-.original_name: Prepara un rico alambre de carne al pastor

ingredients.item: 250 gr de lomo de cerdo o filete de pierna en tiras delgadas
1  chile guajillo seco  ( sin semillas e hidratado)
1  chile ancho seco ( sin semillas e hidratado)
1 / 2 pumpkins with half moons (optional to give freshness)
100 gr de queso oaxaca o manchego rallado

instructions: Loan the chilies hydrated with garlic, vinegar, achiote, pineapple juice, oregano, cumin, salt and pepper till you get a thick sauce.
Mix pork strips with adobo and let rest for at least 1 hour in cooling.
In a large frying pan with hot oil, pits onion, peppers and pumpkin till they are tender but crispy about 5 minutes.
It incorporates the meat into the frying pan with the vegetables and cooks with medium-high heat, stirring to be dyed throughout, for 8 to 10 minutes.
Add pineapple and cook 3 more minutes to caramelate slightly.
Turn off the fire, spread the cheese above and cover the frying pan to melt with residual heat.
Spill fresh cilantro and with tortillas and lemon to taste.

prepare-a-delicious-taro-cheesecake-come.name: Prepare A Delicious Taro Cheesecake
instructions: Tritura las galletas hasta obtener una textura fina.
Mix the cookies with melted butter and scatter into a 22 cm mold. He puts a good light at his bottom.
Refrigera la base de galletas de 10 a 15 minutos hasta que quede compacta. Reserva.
Peel the taro and cut into pieces. Do steam till smooth.
Triple the taro till you have a well-homogenous purée.
With an electrical beaker, beat up the masquerading cheese with the sugar till it's dissolved.
Add the ricotta and beat slightly.
Incorpora uno a uno los huevos y mezcla hasta que se integren.
Add tidal purée, salt, vanilla and cream. Mix carefully until all ingredients are well integrated.
Vierte la mezcla sobre la base de galletas y alisa la superficie.
A purple at 170 ″ To bath Maria for 60 minutes or a little more till the centre's shivering.
Una vez listo, deja enfriar dentro del horno apagado con la puerta entreabierta.
When resting and at room temperature, refrigerates for at least 6 hours and will be ready to enjoy.

prepare-tamarind-and-orange-mezcal-comed.name: Prepare Tamarind And Orange Mezcal
prepare-tamarind-and-orange-mezcal-comed.original_name: Prepara mezcal de tamarindo y naranja
instructions: We will start our recipe, place water in a saucer or pot and you will add the tamarind cup.
Let's cook till it boils about 15 minutes. When it's cooked, you'll shut down and let them cool.
When your tamarines are ready, you will proceed with his pulp. I mean, his seeds and his seedlings.
Now, you'll get that pulp to liquefied with some of the water where it's been cooked and you'll liquefied till everything's been processed.
Esa mezcla la vas a colar para quitarle todos los grumos e impurezas.
Now, in a clear mixer or processor, you'll add tamarind polish, orange juice, mezal, two tablespoons of sugar, ice and liquefied till everything's integrated and as a frippé.
To serve, you'll have your drink or glass and put it through the picket chili across the border. Serve your tamarind and orange mix. Decorate with the orange cuts.
Degusta!

prepare-this-delicious-paraguayan-tortil.name: Prepare This Delicious Paraguayan Tortilla
instructions: Con la ayuda de la batidora o manualmente, mezcla la leche con el harina de trigo hasta formar una consistencia cremosa.
Posteriormente, incorpora los 3 huevos y la sal al gusto. Mezcla muy bien.
Once well mixed, add fresh grated cheese and stir till integrated.
Warm up a frying pan with enough oil to fry.
When hot, put the fire to half and add portions of the mixture with the help of a big tablespoon to form the pancake.
Una vez se dore por un lado, voltea y dora por el otro hasta que se cocine.
Take out the frying pan and put into an absorbing paper to remove the excess oil.
Now, serve and enjoy!

primavera-risotto-nests-with-fried-eggs.name: Primavera Risotto Nests With Fried Eggs

ingredients.item: Freshly grated parmesan cheese plus additional for serving
Shelled fresh peas or thawed frozen peas
Olive oil plus additional for drizzling

instructions: Melt 1 tablespoon butter in medium skillet over medium-high heat. Add mushrooms; sauté until tender, about 5 minutes. Season mushrooms with salt and pepper. Set aside.

Melt 3 tablespoons butter in large pot over medium heat. Add onion; sauté until beginning to soften, 5 minutes. Add garlic; stir 1 minute. Add rice and stir until translucent at edges, 5 minutes. Add wine. Stir until liquid is absorbed, 1 minute. Add 1 cup broth. Simmer until broth is absorbed, stirring often, 3 to 4 minutes. Add carrots, asparagus, and 1 cup broth. Simmer until liquid is absorbed, stirring often, 5 to 6 minutes. Continue to add remaining broth, then water, 1 cup at a time, until rice is just tender and mixture is creamy, stirring often and letting almost all liquid be absorbed after each addition, about 25 minutes total.
Stir 1 cup cheese, peas, parsley, and mushrooms into risotto. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
Heat 1 tablespoon oil in large skillet over medium high heat. Cook eggs, without turning, until whites are cooked through and yolks are cooked to desired doneness.
Mound 1 cup risotto on each of 4 plates. Using back of spoon, make hollow in top of each mound. Top each with egg; drizzle with oil. Serve, passing additional cheese.

puff-pastry-rolls-filled-with-cream-and-.name: Puff Pastry Rolls Filled With Cream And Chocolate
puff-pastry-rolls-filled-with-cream-and-.original_name: Ρολά σφολιάτας γεμιστά με κρέμα και σοκολάτα

ingredients.item: Egg solution for spread (1 yolk with 1-2 tablespoon milk)
Egg solution for spread (1 yolk with 1-2 tablespoon milk)

instructions: We start by making the cream because it must be frozen when we put it in the dough.
We're holding a quarter cup. milk in a bowl and heat the rest in a small pot – not to come to a bowling point.
Add the yolks, vanilla, cornflaur and sugar to the bowl and mix very well with the wire.
Once the milk is hot, pour half gradually into the egg mixture by mixing.
Pour the diluted egg mixture into the pot with the rest of the milk and mix the cream over medium heat until it thickens.
Once blisters appear on its surface, remove it from the fire and incorporate the butter stirring to melt.
Pour the cream into a shallow vessel and cover it with a kitchen membrane which should be tangent to its surface by preventing crust formation. Allow it to cool and then refrigerate to cool.
Add the lukewarm milk, yogurt, sugar and yeast to the mixer's bowl and mix with a spoon to melt the sugar.
Add the flour and work the mixture at low speed for 2-3 minutes until the flour is wet.
Strengthen the mixer and continue the hit for 4-5 minutes.

Add the salt and add the soft button in doses, with the mixerways in order to absorb the mixture. Continue the hit for 8-10 minutes until we have a soft, supple and buttery dough. Cover it and leave it in a warm place for at least 11⁄2 hours, to rest and swell.
Brush our hands with some butter or oil and remove the puffed dough on a slightly floured surface. Press it a little to deflate and turn it on to a large parallelogram 40 x 60 cm.
Shake the excess flour.
Mix the cold cream very well and spread it over the whole surface of the leaf.
Spread over the chocolate drops.
We fold the sheet in three by closing it like a book. Cut it with a sharp knife in 3 cm thick strips.
We twist each lane several times and then wrap it in a snail. We pinch the compound underneath so the rolls don't roll.
Add the rolls to a shallow baking pan lined with non-stick paper leaving a distance between them.
Cover them and place them in a warm place for about 40 minutes, to swell.
Finally, spread all the surface with egg solution and baking them in a well preheated evening, in the air, at 200°C, on the medium grill, for about 15 minutes, until golden.

puff-pastry-with-chocolate-and-hazelnuts.name: Puff Pastry With Chocolate And Hazelnuts
instructions: In a small pot and in low heat melt the margarine with the couverture and the sugary milk.
When they melt, add the cocoa powdered and mix well. Allow the cream to cool and stabilise.
Spread the puff pastry on the counter. Brush with chocolate cream and spread it well over the surface with spatula or wide knife.
Sprinkle with the hazelnuts.
Roll one long side to the middle of the leaf. Roll the other side until the 2 rolls meet and stick along.
We wash the compound with a brush to keep them together in the baking.
Cut into 14 thin slices with a sharp knife. Place them horizontally on sheet with parchment paper.
Sprinkle with sugar.
Bake in a well preheated evening at 200 °C for 15 minutes to brown.
Transfer them to a grill so that they don't drizzle and stay crispy.

pumpkin-bread-with-toasted-coconut.name: Pumpkin Bread With Toasted Coconut
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Lightly coat an 8½x4½" loaf pan with nonstick spray; line with parchment paper, leaving a 2" overhang on all sides. Whisk all-purpose flour, whole wheat flour, baking powder, cinnamon, ginger, salt, allspice, nutmeg, and cloves in a large bowl.

Whisk eggs, pumpkin, brown sugar, and oil in another large bowl until smooth. Mix in dry ingredients. Scrape batter into prepared pan, smooth top, and sprinkle with pumpkin seeds, coconut, and granulated sugar.
Bake bread until golden brown and a tester inserted into the center comes out clean, 50–60 minutes
Transfer pan to a wire rack and let bread cool 30 minutes in pan. Turn out on a wire rack and let cool completely.
DO AHEAD: Bread can be baked 3 days ahead. Keep tightly wrapped at room temperature.

pumpkin-bread-bottom-cheesecake.name: Pumpkin Bread-bottom Cheesecake
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (180°C).
In a large mixing bowl, whisk together pumpkin puree, eggs, sugar, vegetable oil, and vanilla until combined.
Sift in the flour, baking powder, baking soda, pumpkin pie spice, and salt. Using a wooden spoon, mix together until just combined. Be careful to not overmix.
Lightly coat a spring form pan with nonstick cooking spray, and pour batter into the pan, spreading an even layer.
Bake for 35-45 minutes until center comes out clean when tested. Allow to cool completely in the pan.
In a large mixing bowl, whisk together cream cheese, sugar, pumpkin spice, and vanilla extract.
Add in whipping cream and beat for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Spread cheesecake mixture onto the cooled pumpkin bread, spreading evenly. Cover and chill in the fridge for at least 4 hours before serving.
Cut and serve.
Enjoy!

pumpkin-fries-lezzet.name: Pumpkin Fries
instructions: 1. Peel the bark of the yellowms and peel off the shore.
2. Add a bowl of yogurt and add a yellowms, and whiskey.
3. Peel the peel of the pumpkin with a sharp leg.
4. slice orange-retardant in the form of a finger thick parts.
5. Take a rough roughly the egg, and take it.
6. Unu also import a rougher of the spring.
7. Heat the olive oil in the pan.
8. Find and shredded slices of pumpkins and shredded eggs.
9. Add to the pan with heated olive oil and fry the pumpkin parts.
10. Take the excess oil to whilemove for paper towels.
11. 11. 11. 11. Pure wealth with salty and spicy yogurt.

pumpkin-lasagna-roll-ups.name: Pumpkin Lasagna Roll-ups

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or 1 tsp. morton kosher salt
. plus 2 tsp. diamond crystal or 1 tbsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 375°. Cook 1 lb. dried lasagna noodles in a large pot of boiling generously salted water, stirring often to prevent sticking, until al dente, about 5 minutes. Drain and rinse under cold running water, separating noodles. Lay out in a single layer on a baking sheet, patting dry as needed; set aside.

Mix 2 large eggs, 8 oz. fresh ricotta (about 1 cup), 1 oz. Parmesan, finely grated (about ½ cup), 1 cup finely chopped baby spinach (about 2.5 oz.), 1 tsp. freshly ground pepper, 1 tsp. garlic powder, and remaining 1½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 tsp. Morton kosher salt in a medium bowl until smooth and no visible streaks of egg remain; set ricotta mixture aside.

Heat 1 Tbsp. plus 1½ tsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a large cast-iron or ovenproof stainless-steel skillet over medium. Add 2 medium shallots, finely chopped, and cook, stirring often, until softened and translucent, about 5 minutes. Add 4 garlic cloves, finely chopped, and 2 Tbsp. finely chopped thyme and cook, stirring often, until fragrant, about 1 minute. Add one 15-oz. can unsweetened pumpkin purée and cook, stirring occasionally, until darkened to a deep orange, about 5 minutes. Add 1 cup heavy cream, 1 Tbsp. plus 2 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 Tbsp. Morton kosher salt, 1 tsp. dried oregano, ½ tsp. freshly ground nutmeg, 1 tsp. freshly ground pepper, and 1 cup water and stir until smooth. Add 2 oz. Parmesan, finely grated (about 1 cup), and cook, stirring occasionally, until cheese is melted and sauce has thickened slightly, about 2 minutes. Remove from heat and transfer 1½ cups sauce to a small bowl; set aside. Leave remaining sauce in skillet.

Working one at a time, spoon 1 heaping Tbsp. reserved ricotta mixture onto each noodle and spread evenly from end to end. Tightly roll up noodles. Arrange lasagna rolls, seam side down, in skillet, starting from the center and working in a circle toward edges to create a spiral. Top with reserved sauce; scatter 4 oz. low-moisture mozzarella, coarsely grated (about 1 cup), over. Bake until cheese is deep golden brown, 33–38 minutes. Let lasagna cool slightly. Top with thyme leaves and season with more pepper to serve.

put-it-on-everything-cashew-sauce.name: Put-it-on-everything Cashew Sauce

ingredients.item: . unseasoned rice or distilled white vinegar

ingredients.prep: such as radicchio, carrots, radishes, and batons of bread (for serving)

instructions: Bring 2 cups water to a boil in a tea kettle or small saucepan. Place 2 cups cashews in a medium heatproof bowl and cover with boiling water. Cover bowl with a plate or plastic wrap and let sit 10 minutes.
Strain cashews through a fine-mesh sieve into another medium bowl, reserving soaking liquid.
Transfer nuts to blender, then add 1 cup herbs, 2 Tbsp. vinegar, 1 Tbsp. salt, and half of soaking liquid.
Blend on medium speed, scraping down sides with a spatula and adding more soaking liquid as needed, until cashew cream is very smooth and the consistency of yogurt, 1–2 minutes.
Using spatula, transfer cashew cream to a medium bowl. Serve with crudités alongside.
